title: Add An AGV Back Into The System Using Recover AGV
summary: Use the Recover AGV control in the AGVs section of the System HMI API screen to add a specified AGV back into the system by entering its AGV ID.
when_to_use: Use when an AGV needs to be added back into the system and the AGV ID is known, using the Recover AGV control in the AGVs section of the API screen.
not_for: Do not use for AGV removal from the system; the source identifies Remove AGV as a separate control.
Do not use when validation messages, prerequisites, or alternate recovery conditions are required; the source does not provide them.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the System HMI API screen, enter the AGV ID, and use Recover AGV to add the AGV back into the system.

safety_notes: This is a system HMI recovery action.
The source does not provide additional safety warnings, interlocks, or lockout requirements for this action.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the System HMI API screen
AGVs section of the API screen

system_preconditions: The AGV ID for the AGV to be added back into the system is known.

visual_references.description: AGV API Controls screen showing the AGVs section of the API screen and the Recover AGV control.
ACB API screen used to access system, AGV, and tote controls.

steps.title: Open the AGVs section of the API screen
steps.purpose: Access the AGV controls area where Recover AGV is available.
steps.instruction: Open the System HMI API screen and navigate to the AGVs section.
steps.expected_result: The AGVs section of the API screen is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV API Controls area is displayed and the Recover AGV control is available on screen.
steps.failure_condition: The API screen or AGVs section cannot be accessed or the Recover AGV control is not visible.

actions.label: Open AGV API controls
actions.exact_action: Open the AGVs section of the API screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The API screen entry point used to access system, AGV, and tote controls.
The AGV API Controls area showing the AGVs section and Recover AGV control.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the AGVs section of the API screen cannot be opened.
Stop or escalate if the Recover AGV control is not available on the AGV API Controls screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Users press API on the ACB System screen to access this screen. From this ACB API interface, the OptiSweep system, AGVs, and totes can be controlled.
Figure 4-12 documents the AGVs section of the API screen and AGV API Controls including Recover AGV.

steps.title: Locate the Recover AGV control and AGV ID field
steps.purpose: Identify the specific control and input needed to recover the AGV.
steps.instruction: On the AGV API Controls screen, locate the Recover AGV control and the AGV ID entry field used for the recovery action.
steps.expected_result: The Recover AGV control and AGV ID input field are identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can clearly identify where to enter the AGV ID and where to trigger Recover AGV.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV ID field or Recover AGV control cannot be identified on the screen.

actions.label: Identify recovery controls
actions.exact_action: Locate the Recover AGV control and the AGV ID entry field.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Recover AGV control and the AGV ID entry area within the AGV API Controls screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the AGV ID entry field cannot be found.
Stop or escalate if the Recover AGV control cannot be identified.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Recover AGV: Enter an AGV ID to add it to the system.

steps.title: Enter the AGV ID
steps.purpose: Specify which AGV is to be added back into the system.
steps.instruction: Enter the AGV ID for the AGV to be added back into the system.
steps.expected_result: The intended AGV ID is entered in the AGV ID field.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV ID field contains the AGV ID for the AGV being recovered.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV ID is unavailable, cannot be entered, or appears incorrect.

actions.label: Enter AGV ID
actions.exact_action: Enter the AGV ID for the AGV to be added back to the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV ID entry field used with Recover AGV.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the correct AGV ID is not known.
Stop or escalate if the AGV ID cannot be entered into the field.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Recover AGV: Enter an AGV ID to add it to the system.

steps.title: Use Recover AGV to add the AGV back into the system
steps.purpose: Execute the recovery action that returns the specified AGV to the system.
steps.instruction: Use the Recover AGV control after entering the AGV ID to add the AGV back into the system.
steps.expected_result: The specified AGV is added back into the system.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV is added back into the system using the entered AGV ID.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV is not added back into the system after using Recover AGV.

actions.label: Recover AGV
actions.exact_action: Use the Recover AGV control to add the AGV to the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Recover AGV control used to submit the AGV ID and add the AGV back into the system.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the AGV cannot be added back to the system after entering the AGV ID.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Recover AGV: Enter an AGV ID to add it to the system.

success_criteria: The specified AGV is added back into the system.
The Recover AGV action is completed using the AGV ID entry on the AGV API Controls screen.
healthy_conditions: The AGVs section of the API screen is accessible.
The Recover AGV control and AGV ID field are visible.
The AGV ID can be entered.
The AGV is added back into the system after using Recover AGV.
failure_conditions: The API screen or AGVs section cannot be accessed.
The Recover AGV control or AGV ID field cannot be located.
The AGV ID cannot be entered or is not known.
The AGV cannot be added back into the system after using Recover AGV.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the AGV cannot be added back into the system after entering the AGV ID.
Escalate if required validation messages, prerequisites, or confirmation indicators are needed but not available in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AGV API Controls screen showing Recover AGV and the AGV ID entry area.
API screen used to access AGV controls.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Recover AGV: Enter an AGV ID to add it to the system.

missing_details: The source does not provide explicit confirmation messages or validation indicators for successful AGV recovery.
The source does not provide detailed prerequisites beyond entering an AGV ID.
The source does not provide a detailed navigation sequence beyond using the API screen and AGVs section.
The source does not provide timing estimates for this procedure.
The source does not specify production stop or LOTO requirements for this action.
